title: EQ - Changes to EQ settings are heard in real time
scenario: EQ setting changes (Bass, Flat, Bright, Custom EQ sliders) are heard in real time while music is playing, with Custom EQ taking effect on slider release
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected device name.
4. Play music on the connected device.
5. Tap on the 'Bass' preset and listen to the audio output.
6. Tap on the 'Flat' preset and listen to the audio output.
7. Tap on the 'Bright' preset and listen to the audio output.
9. Adjust one of the Custom EQ sliders (e.g., 60 Hz, 230 Hz, 910 Hz, 4 kHz, 14 kHz) and release the slider.
10. Listen to the audio output after releasing the slider.
expected: Audio output changes in real time when switching between Bass, Flat, and Bright presets. For Custom EQ, changes take effect only when the user releases the slider.
